tasks.name: Order 6 stainless steel square tubes 2 in x 2 in x 6 ft under $80 each
tasks.description: Find stainless steel square tubing, filter to 2 in x 2 in x 6 ft pieces priced under $80 each, select the cheapest matching product, and add 6 units to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled 'Products' or similar.
From the product categories, click the option related to 'Tubing' or 'Square Tubes'.
Use the material filter in the sidebar or filter bar to select 'Stainless Steel' only.
Use available size or dimension filters to set the profile to 2 in x 2 in and the length to 6 ft.
Open the price filter and set the maximum price to $80 per unit.
Use the sort dropdown to select 'Price - Low to High'.
From the filtered and sorted list, click on the first product that matches the 2 in x 2 in x 6 ft stainless steel tube under $80.
On the product detail page, type '6' into the quantity field and click the 'Add to Cart' button.

tasks.name: Request a quote for 15 custom laser-cut steel plates 1000 mm x 500 mm x 10 mm
tasks.description: Use the laser cutting or custom fabrication quote form to configure 15 steel plates sized 1000 mm x 500 mm with 10 mm thickness, set a tolerance of ±0.5 mm, and submit a quote request with shipping to ZIP code 94105.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on 'Services' or a similar menu and then select the 'Laser Cutting' or 'Custom Cutting' service.
On the laser cutting service page, click the button or link labeled 'Request a Quote' or 'Get a Quote'.
In the quote form, select 'Steel' as the material from the material dropdown.
Enter '10' as the thickness value and choose 'mm' as the unit if a unit selector is present.
Enter '1000' in the length field and '500' in the width field, ensuring the units are in millimeters.
In the quantity field, type '15' and in the tolerance field choose or type '±0.5 mm' as the required tolerance.
In the shipping or location section, enter '94105' in the ZIP/postal code field and select 'United States' as the country if required.
Fill in the contact section with a name, and enter an email address like 'customer@example.com', then click the 'Submit Quote Request' button.

tasks.name: Buy the cheapest galvanized steel handrail kit for 3 steps under $250 with free shipping
tasks.description: Find galvanized steel handrail kits suitable for 3 steps, filter for free standard shipping and price under $250, then choose the cheapest option and add 1 kit to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the search bar in the header and type 'galvanized handrail kit'.
Press Enter or click the search icon to perform the search.
Use any 'Application' or 'Use' filter to select an option like '3 steps' or '1 to 3 steps' that fits a 3-step staircase.
Open the shipping filter and select 'Free Standard Shipping' or the equivalent option indicating free shipping.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to $250.
Use the sort dropdown to select 'Price - Low to High'.
From the filtered results, click on the first product card (the cheapest galvanized handrail kit that meets the criteria).
On the product detail page, ensure the quantity field is set to '1' and click the 'Add to Cart' button.

tasks.name: Schedule a factory tour for a group of 4 people next month via the contact/booking form
tasks.description: Find the factory or facilities tour information page and fill out the booking/contact form to schedule a tour for 4 people on a weekday date within the next calendar month at 10:00 AM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, click on 'About Us', 'Our Facilities', or a similar section.
On the About/Facilities page, look for and click the link or button labeled 'Factory Tours', 'Schedule a Visit', or similar.
On the tour information page, click the 'Book a Tour' or 'Request a Visit' button to open the booking/contact form.
In the form, enter a weekday date that falls within the next calendar month in the 'Preferred Date' field.
In the 'Time' or 'Preferred Time' field, enter or select '10:00 AM'.
In the 'Number of Visitors' or 'Group Size' field, type '4'.
Fill in the name and email fields, using an email like 'visitor@example.com', and add a short message stating that you are requesting a factory tour for 4 people at 10:00 AM.
Click the 'Submit', 'Send Request', or equivalent button to send the tour request.

tasks.name: Save a structural steel HEA 200 beam and download its technical datasheet
tasks.description: Locate the HEA 200 structural steel beam product, download its technical datasheet from the product page, and add the product to a saved list or wishlist on the site.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on 'Products' in the main navigation and choose the category related to 'Beams' or 'Structural Steel'.
Use any profile or type filter to select the 'HEA' profile type.
In the size or dimension filter, select or type '200' to filter for the HEA 200 size.
From the filtered list, click on the product entry for the 'HEA 200' structural steel beam.
On the product detail page, locate and click the link or button labeled 'Technical Datasheet', 'PDF Datasheet', or similar to download or open the datasheet.
On the same product page, click the 'Add to Wishlist', 'Save Product', or equivalent button to save the HEA 200 beam.
If prompted to choose or name a list, select an existing default list or type a list name like 'Project Beams' and confirm by clicking the corresponding button.

tasks.name: Configure a custom metal storage cabinet under $600 and add 2 units to cart
tasks.description: Use the cabinet configurator to create a metal storage cabinet about 2000 mm high, at least 900 mm wide, 450–500 mm deep, in color RAL 7035 with 4 shelves and a lockable door, keep the price below $600 per unit, and add quantity 2 to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, select 'Products' and then choose the category for 'Cabinets', 'Storage', or 'Enclosures'.
On the cabinets page, click a button or link labeled 'Configure', 'Customize', or 'Build Your Cabinet' to open the configurator.
In the height field, enter a value close to 2000 mm (for example, '2000') and select 'mm' as the unit if needed.
Set the width to a value of at least 900 mm (for example, '900') and set the depth to a value between 450 mm and 500 mm (for example, '450').
In the color selector, choose 'RAL 7035' or the option labeled 'Light Grey RAL 7035'.
Use the shelving options to select '4 shelves' and turn on or select the option for a 'Lockable door' or 'Door with lock'.

If a price is shown in the configurator, adjust any optional add-ons or extras by deselecting them until the total price per unit is below $600, then click 'Add to Cart' or 'Add Configuration to Cart'.
On the cart or mini-cart, set the quantity for this configured cabinet to '2' using the quantity field or plus/minus controls.

tasks.name: Submit an emergency repair service request for the Midwest region within 24 hours
tasks.description: Find the emergency or on-site repair services page, select the Midwest region, specify that service is needed within 24 hours, and submit a completed service request form with contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, click 'Services' and select 'Emergency Repair', 'On-Site Repair', or a similar service option.
On the emergency repair service page, locate a region selector and choose 'Midwest' from the list of regions.
Click the 'Request Service', 'Book Repair', or equivalent button to open the service request form.
In the form, choose the priority or response time option labeled 'Within 24 hours' or the fastest available option that clearly indicates a response in 24 hours or less.
In the problem description or 'Issue Details' field, type a brief description stating that you need urgent repair service for metal equipment in the Midwest within 24 hours.
Fill in your name, phone number, and an email address such as 'plant.manager@example.com' in the respective fields.
Enter the site address including street, city, and ZIP code, and then click the 'Submit Request', 'Send', or equivalent button to send the emergency service request.

tasks.name: Choose the cheapest shipping option that delivers within 5 days for a mixed metal order
tasks.description: Add one sheet of 3 mm aluminum, two 1 m lengths of steel angle, and four stainless bolts to the cart, proceed to shipping options, and select the lowest-cost shipping method that shows delivery within 5 days.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the search bar to search for '3 mm aluminum sheet' and open the product page for a standard aluminum sheet around 3 mm thick.
On the aluminum sheet product page, set the quantity to '1' and click 'Add to Cart'.
Use the navigation or search to find 'steel angle 1 m' and open a product page for steel angle bar with a length of about 1 meter.
On the steel angle product page, set the quantity to '2' and click 'Add to Cart'.
Use the search bar to search for 'stainless steel bolts' and open a product page for standard stainless bolts.
On the bolts product page, set the quantity to '4' and click 'Add to Cart'.
Go to the cart page using the cart icon or 'View Cart' link, then click the 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout' button to reach the shipping options step.

On the shipping options screen, from the available shipping methods, click to select the option that has the lowest price among those whose description indicates delivery in 5 days or less (for example, an option labeled 'Economy 3–5 business days' if it is cheaper than other options with delivery times of 5 days or less).

website_type: metal fabrication and products company website
